item.title: 语言模型中可靠性和扩展的信息理论限制
item.summary: arXiv:2607.14112v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are evaluated as though perfect reliability is achievable for any task given sufficient scale. We show this assumption is information-theoretically unjustified. Every generative task has a reliability ceiling that no model can exceed, determin
